description: Currently self-managing their own short-term let via Airbnb or similar. Considering handing over to Stayful. Main drivers: reducing workload, income optimisation, or can no longer manage themselves.
key_drivers: income could be optimised with professional management
moving away and cannot manage remotely
guest issues becoming difficult to handle alone
wanting professional pricing and booking optimisation
key_objections: 15% management fee on top of current platform fees
loss of control over their own listing
concern that Stayful cannot match their own occupancy
not wanting to change what is already working
what_resonates: income comparison showing Stayful net vs their current DIY net
scale benefits: Stayful direct bookings (40%) reducing platform fees
pitch_angle: You are doing great work managing yourself. Stayful can do what you do, earn more, and take the work off your plate entirely. Your income goes up, your time commitment goes to zero.
closing_approach: Show the income uplift over their current self-managed income. Be specific about what Stayful does differently. Make the time saving concrete.

notable_leads.name: Elliot
notable_leads.note: LONDON W4. 90-day restriction. Verify planning before progressing.

notable_leads.name: Taj
notable_leads.note: CONVERTED. Was urgency-driven. Hospital proximity plus deadline offer closed.
